policy_questions.question: What is the travel lodging standard for D1/经理级 in city tier A?
policy_questions.expected_answer: 650元/晚 for 经理级 in 一类城市

policy_questions.question: Does AR-02 approval tier require financial review (财务复核) in addition to department manager?
policy_questions.expected_answer: Yes, AR-02 requires 部门经理 + 财务复核

policy_questions.question: Is self-approval prohibited or restricted?
policy_questions.expected_answer: Separation of duties principle; self-approval without financial review violates AR-02 requirement

policy_questions.question: Does exceeding the standard without special approval violate Article 12?
policy_questions.expected_answer: Yes, Article 12: reimbursement cannot exceed 1.0x standard without special approval
